summary.description:
Today, cooler for the feels like temperature (down 4.4°C) and outside temperature (down 4.1°C), more moisture-laden outside humidity (up 9%), and drier conditions in rainfall (down 0.2 mm).

Compared to today, yesterday also had noticeable differences in rainfall (up 0.2 mm), cloud levels (up 700 m), and light levels (up 4480 lux).

The past week and month had observable variation in rainfall (up 0.2 mm), cloud levels (up 1648 m), and light levels (up 6460 lux) when compared to today.

Today’s average cloud levels is 700.0m lower than yesterday, 616.5m lower than the past week, 1647.9m lower than the past month.

The cloud levels for yesterday ranged from 1059m to 3380m and averaged 1024.2m, while the past week and month indicated warmer conditions.

summary.summary: Inside; temperature should feel pleasantly mild. Outside; mild and pleasant. Also, air moisture should feel ok. Possible light showers, clouds will occasionally block sunlight, and periods of sunshine are expected. Weather could become unsettled.
